member.name: T:Sample.Plugins.AccountLifecyclePlugin
member.summary: One plugin class can register multiple steps by applying several [CrmPluginRegistration] attributes. Dataverse invokes Execute once per matching step.

member.name: T:Sample.Plugins.MultiCustomApiPlugin
member.summary: One plugin class can implement multiple Custom APIs. Each API is declared with its own [CrmPluginRegistration] attribute; request/response metadata is scoped with ApiUniqueName.

member.name: T:DataverseModel.DataverseContext
member.summary: Represents a source of entities bound to a Dataverse service. It tracks and manages changes made to the retrieved entities.

member.summary: Constructor.

member.name: P:DataverseModel.DataverseContext.AccountSet
member.summary: Gets a binding to the set of all entities.

member.name: T:DataverseModel.OptionSetMetadataAttribute
member.summary: Attribute to handle storing the OptionSet's Metadata.

member.summary: Color of the OptionSetValue.

member.summary: Description of the OptionSetValue.

member.summary: Display order index of the OptionSetValue.

member.summary: External value of the OptionSetValue.

member.summary: Name of the OptionSetValue.

member.summary: Names of the OptionSetValue.

member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the class.
member.param: Display order index of the value.

member.summary: Extension class to handle retrieving of OptionSetMetadataAttribute.

member.summary: Returns the OptionSetMetadataAttribute for the given enum value

member.name: T:DataverseModel.Account
member.summary: Business that represents a customer or potential customer. The company that is billed in business transactions.

member.summary: Available fields, at the time of codegen, for the account entity

member.summary: Default Constructor.

member.summary: Type the company or business name.

member.summary: Constructor for populating via LINQ queries given a LINQ anonymous type LINQ anonymous type.

member.summary: Returns the integer version of an OptionSetValue

member.summary: Returns a collection of integer version's of an Multi-Select OptionSetValue for a given attribute on the passed entity

member.name: M:DataverseModel.EntityOptionSetEnum.GetMultiEnum``1(Microsoft.Xrm.Sdk.Entity,System.String,System.Collections.Generic.IEnumerable{``0})
member.summary: Returns a OptionSetValueCollection based on a list of Multi-Select OptionSetValues
